first_error_text: HEXA_BIN_MISSING at 2026-04-19T15:48:48Z — forward_with_lora stub RC_ERR_CUDA_TODO (-5), awaiting BG agent a48c754f6c52a490a to land v5 CUDA + hexa native bootstrap

The downstream blocker (hxqwen14b_forward_with_lora → -5) is therefore guarded behind an earlier bootstrap blocker. Watchdog spawn_trainer() detects HEXA_BIN_MISSING first; once bootstrap lands (hexa binary + anima repo + corpus), next retry will hit the true RC_ERR_CUDA_TODO from hxqwen14b.c forward stub. Both markers share the BLOCKED_FFI retry loop path.

weights_downloaded.shards: 16/16 (8 safetensors + config + index + tokenizer + vocab + merges + special_tokens_map + generation_config + tokenizer_config)

v54_smoke_20260419T1715Z.gpu_before_smoke: 0% util, 0 processes, 0 MiB used — safe to load

driver.tokens_used: 19-token ChatML scaffold (151644 im_start, 872 user, 198 newline, Korean-themed mid-id ids, 151645 im_end, 151644 assistant_header)

smoke_result.verdict: OUT_OF_BAND (CE > random baseline; distinct from stub — real forward produces deterministic wrong-direction logits)

root_cause_identified.symptom: CE=16.48 > random 11.51 → logits actively skewed (not noise)
root_cause_identified.code_evidence: hxqwen14b_v54.c:3253 comment '(lm_head is tied to embed — no separate slot.)' — V54_N_SLOTS = 1 (embed) + 48*9 (layers) + 1 (final_norm) = 434
root_cause_identified.runtime_evidence: base_forward_v54 line calling hxqwen14b_cu_launch_tied_lm_head(ln, slots[V54_SLOT_EMBED].dev_ptr_fp32, ...) — forces tied embedding reuse
root_cause_identified.config_contradiction: /workspace/weights/qwen14b/config.json has 'tie_word_embeddings: false' — Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct ships a DISTINCT model.embed_tokens.weight and lm_head.weight pair
root_cause_identified.effect: Using embed_tokens^T as lm_head is a uniform wrong projection → every logit landscape biased → CE systematically high (above random)
fix_required: Load it in hxqwen14b_load_all_weights (same path as embed, from shard index)
Swap base_forward_v54 final launch: tied_lm_head → new untied_lm_head (or reuse sgemm_rowmajor_xwt with lm_head.weight)
root_cause_identified.commit_impact: v5.4 sealed at 96d2ea3a — fix goes into follow-up commit v5.4.1 (or v5.5)

v54_smoke_20260419T1715Z.swap_reason: Swapping v5.4 .so with wrong-direction CE=16.5 would put r11 watchdog on a provably broken LM forward. Keeping v5.3 stub (live) is strictly safer until v5.4.1 fixes the untied lm_head slot. This matches scope hedge: 'If CE is wrong after full 5-point debug: save detailed diagnostics + roll back'.
v54_smoke_20260419T1715Z.live_so_untouched: /workspace/hexa-lang/self/native/libhxqwen14b.so (v5.3, 107176 bytes) — NOT modified. No .v53.bak needed because no swap happened.
v54_smoke_20260419T1715Z.v54_so_preserved_for_fix: /workspace/hxqwen14b_build/libhxqwen14b_v54.so (141984 bytes) — stays in build dir for v5.4.1 rebuild reference.
v54_smoke_20260419T1715Z.watchdog_impact: NONE — r11 trainer still dlopens v5.3 live .so. Stub RC_ERR_CUDA_TODO continues until v5.4.1 correct .so lands.
follow_ups: BG agent or next session: apply 5-line fix to hxqwen14b_v54.c (add V54_SLOT_LM_HEAD), rebuild, re-run /workspace/hxqwen14b_build/smoke_driver, if CE ∈ [1.5, 5.0] then atomic mv into live path
After successful swap: update r11 launch state v54_smoke.status → SWAPPED_LIVE and watchdog will transition next 60s poll

v541_smoke_20260420T0223Z.fix_applied: Untied lm_head slot (V54_SLOT_LM_HEAD=434, V54_N_SLOTS=435); v54_slot_name returns 'lm_head.weight'; load_all_weights shape set [V=152064,d=5120]; base_forward swaps hxqwen14b_cu_launch_tied_lm_head → hxqwen14b_cu_launch_sgemm_rowmajor_xwt(ln, lm_head.weight, logits, M, V, d, 1.0f, 0.0f); loaded guard added

smoke_result.verdict: OUT_OF_BAND (tiny improvement — confirms untied lm_head was one component but NOT root)

deeper_root_cause_identified.symptom: CE=16.26 > random 11.93 even after correct untied lm_head → forward math still systematically wrong
deeper_root_cause_identified.smoking_gun: Qwen2 architecture has biases on q_proj/k_proj/v_proj (NOT o_proj/mlp), confirmed via `grep q_proj.bias /workspace/weights/qwen14b/model.safetensors.index.json` → 48 tensors present per proj
deeper_root_cause_identified.v54_skip: hxqwen14b_v54.c v54_slot_name only knows 9 per-layer tensors (no bias), and base_forward_v54 computes q/k/v via plain sgemm_rowmajor_xwt with no bias add — all 48 layers systematically miscomputed
deeper_root_cause_identified.effect: Zero bias on Q/K/V → logits systematically biased in wrong direction → CE > random even with correct weights
fix_required: Add 3 bias slots per layer (q_proj.bias, k_proj.bias, v_proj.bias) → V54_N_LAYER_TENSORS 9→12, V54_N_SLOTS 435→579 (48×12 + 1 embed + 1 final_norm + 1 lm_head)
Shape for bias tensors: [HQ*HD] for q, [HK*HD] for k,v — 1-D
New CUDA kernel: hxqwen14b_cu_launch_add_bias_1d(X [M,N], bias [N], N_rows=M) — elementwise add bias per row
Modify base_forward_v54: after each sgemm_rowmajor_xwt(ln, w_q, q, ...) add a bias call before RoPE
deeper_root_cause_identified.scope: ~150 lines: 4-5 line constant bump + 20 line slot name/shape extension + 30 line loader branch + 30 line base_forward mods + 40 line CUDA kernel + re-link
deeper_root_cause_identified.not_in_this_iteration: Task scoped as 5-line lm_head fix; QKV bias surgery deserves its own diff

v541_smoke_20260420T0223Z.swap_reason: CE=16.25 still outside [1.5, 5.0] band. Swapping would put r11 on broken forward. v5.3 live .so (107176 bytes, md5 ca10f985...) unchanged at /workspace/hexa-lang/self/native/libhxqwen14b.so.
v541_smoke_20260420T0223Z.watchdog_impact: NONE — r11 trainer still dlopens v5.3 live .so
follow_ups: v5.4.2: add Q/K/V bias slots + CUDA kernel + base_forward mods — separate diff, ~150 LOC
Alternative: keep v5.4.1 .so as reference while v5.4.2 lands the real fix
Re-run smoke after v5.4.2; if CE ∈ [1.5, 5.0] then atomic swap per original plan
